caption: A man with blond hair and glasses, wearing a dark blue t-shirt, is seen in a small picture-in-picture window against a backdrop featuring a Christmas tree and a blue wall. In the first two frames, he is overlaid on a purple-themed video game menu titled "HALFTIME ADJUSTMENTS: DEFENSE" with a countdown timer moving from ":27" to ":26". The menu lists "SUPERSTAR ABILITIES" and "ACTIVE SUPERSTARS," including names like "MONTEZ SWEAT" and "DEXTER LAWRENCE II". The third frame transitions to a "HALFTIME: WAITING ROOM" screen with a countdown timer of ":26" and checkboxes for "HOME" and "AWAY" both marked "READY". In the final frame, the scene shifts to a wide shot of an American football field where players in white and black uniforms are gathered on the sidelines, while one player in a black jersey numbered "89" stands on the green grass.
